reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when checked-in tests or a recorded Cautilus run directly prove the claim boundary without expanding it.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in fixture-runtime evidence bundle: the focused CLI test passes `--runtime fixture`, asserts fixture proof metadata in eval-observed, and a self-dogfood dev/skill adapter run emitted accept-now eval packets while using adapter-owned fixture results.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing `eval test`, runtime selection, adapter runner template rendering, or fixture-result backend plumbing.
